itemListElement.name: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
First principles thinking is the act of boiling a process down to the fundamenta
Question assumptions. The things you think are obviously true might not be.
Build for decades, not quarters. The best companies are built by people who thin
The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
Actions reveal priorities. Watch what people do, not what they say.
Stay curious, stay humble. The moment you think you know everything is the momen
How you do anything is how you do everything.
The obstacle is the way. What stands in the way becomes the way.
We suffer more in imagination than in reality.
You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will f
Be so good they can't ignore you.
Comfort is the enemy of progress.
What got you here won't get you there.
Learn in public. Share your work before you're ready.
Compound interest in all things - money, knowledge, relationships, skills.
The goal isn't more money. The goal is living life on your terms.
Rich is having money. Wealthy is having time.
Simple is harder than complex. You have to work hard to get your thinking clean
